testcase.name: AgenzieCase Platform › should load main application
AgenzieCase Platform › should display property search functionality
AgenzieCase Platform › should have responsive design
AgenzieCase Platform › should handle empty states gracefully
AgenzieCase Platform › should have working navigation
AgenzieCase Platform › should display contact information
AgenzieCase Platform › should handle error states
AgenzieCase Platform › should load images efficiently
AgenzieCase Platform › should have working property filters
AgenzieCase Platform › should display property details correctly
Authentication Flow › should show login button on home page
Authentication Flow › should have working navigation
Authentication Flow › should handle property search
Authentication Flow › should be responsive on mobile
Authentication Flow › should load without JavaScript errors
Dashboard Flow › should redirect to login when accessing protected dashboard
Dashboard Flow › should display dashboard after login
Dashboard Flow › should show navigation menu
Dashboard Flow › should display user profile info when logged in
Dashboard Flow › should handle logout
Mobile Experience › should be usable on mobile devices
Mobile Experience › should display property cards correctly on mobile
Mobile Experience › should have touch-friendly buttons on mobile
Mobile Experience › should handle mobile form input
Mobile Experience › should work in landscape mode
Properties Flow › should display properties on home page
Properties Flow › should filter properties by city
Properties Flow › should filter properties by price range
Properties Flow › should navigate to property details
Properties Flow › should display property images
Properties Flow › should show property contact form
Properties Flow › should handle pagination if available
Properties Flow › should display property prices correctly
Smoke Tests › should load homepage
Smoke Tests › should have working links
Smoke Tests › should display content
Smoke Tests › should handle 404 gracefully
